# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent envoy authz filter missing.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 10000 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.tls_inspector
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.http_inspector
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.original_dst
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.proxy_protocol
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.http.router.v2.Router
          - name: envoy.filters.http.ext_authz
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.http.ext_authz.v2.ExtAuthz
              grpc_service:
                envoy_grpc:
                  cluster_name: ext_authz
                timeout: 1s
              failure_mode_allow: false
              with_request_body:
                max_request_bytes: 1024
                allow_partial_message: true
          - name: envoy.filters.http.cors
          - name: envoy.filters.http.rbac
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.http.rbac.v2.RBAC
              rules:
                policies:
                  "allow_all":
                    permissions:
                    - any: true
                    principals:
                    - any: true
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: service_cluster
                  timeout: 30s
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream"
                    num_retries: 3
                    per_try_timeout: 5s
                    retry_back_off:
                      base_interval: 0.25s
                      max_interval: 1s
                  upgrade_configs:
                  - upgrade_type: websocket
  clusters:
  - name: service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: service
                port_value: 80
    http2_protocol_options: {}
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 1000
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 5s
      interval: 30s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
    typed_extension_protocol_options:
      envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
        explicit_http_config:
          http2_protocol_options:
            max_concurrent_streams: 100
  - name: ext_authz
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: ext_authz
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: authz-service
                port_value: 443
    transport_socket:
      name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
      typed_config:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext
        common_tls_context:
          tls_params:
            tls_minimum_protocol_version: TLSv1_2
          validation_context:
            trusted_ca:
              filename: /etc/envoy/certs/ca.crt
            match_subject_alt_names:
            - dns_name: authz-service
    http2_protocol_options: {}
